1_body.background: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 20%, rgba(124, 201, 214, 0.16), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, radial-gradient(circle at 80% 10%, rgba(234, 251, 87, 0.24), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 14%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(236, 231, 225), rgba(216, 209, 200, 0.92)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
1_body.background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 20%, rgba(124, 201, 214, 0.16), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 10%, rgba(234, 251, 87, 0.24), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 14%), linear-gradient(rgb(236, 231, 225), rgba(216, 209, 200, 0.92))

1b_bodyBefore.background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(163, 155, 144, 0.12) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 320px 100% padding-box border-box, linear-gradient(rgba(163, 155, 144, 0.08) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% 220px padding-box border-box, radial-gradient(circle at 20% 18%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.86), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 24%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) radial-gradient(circle at 72% 32%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.62), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 18%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
1b_bodyBefore.background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(163, 155, 144, 0.12) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px), linear-gradient(rgba(163, 155, 144, 0.08) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px), radial-gradient(circle at 20% 18%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.86), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 24%), radial-gradient(circle at 72% 32%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.62), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 18%)

2_appHeaderTrigger.background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.96), rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.28) 55%, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.06) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(236, 231, 225, 0.92), rgba(216, 209, 200, 0.82)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
2_appHeaderTrigger.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

2b_triggerDot.background: rgb(234, 251, 87) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

3_featuredCard.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52), rgba(216, 209, 200, 0.62)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

4_weatherReadout.background: rgba(23, 21, 19, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

4b_readoutLabel.font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

4c_readoutValue.font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

4d_readoutSummary.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

4e_readoutMeta.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

5_statusPillReady.background: rgb(234, 251, 87) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
5_statusPillReady.font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

6_forecastChip.background: rgba(23, 21, 19, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

6b_chipLabel.font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

6c_chipStrong.font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

6d_chipP.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

7_additionalCard.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

8_popoverSurface.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

9_popoverArrowBefore.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

9b_popoverArrowEl.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

10_editTrigger.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

12_popoverChip.background: rgba(23, 21, 19, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

14_searchPanel.background: rgba(23, 21, 19, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

15_searchInput.background: rgb(236, 231, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
15_searchInput.font-family: "Source Sans 3", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
